gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/358)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/358)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْعَقِيقُ أَمَانٌ فِي السَّفَرِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from one of his companions, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The carnelian is a safety during the journey’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from certain persons of his people in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Agate is safety on a journey.’”
